phrases.text_local: Onde posso obter o carimbo do passaporte?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo awb-TEHR AW kuh-REEM-boo DOO puh-suh-PAW-ruh-tih?

likely_response.local: Fale com o voluntário do carimbo.
likely_response.pronunciation: FAH-lih KOHM AW voo-loonng-TAHR-yoo DOO kuh-REEM-boo.

responses.phonetic: FAH-lih KOHM AW voo-loonng-TAHR-yoo DOO kuh-REEM-boo.
responses.french: Fale com o voluntário do carimbo.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar informações sobre a Ponte Romana no mapa?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH SOHB-rih AH POHNG-tih roo-MAHN-nuh NOO MAH-puh?

likely_response.local: Consulte o mapa na exposição da Ponte Romana ou pergunte ao atendente de turismo no balcão de informações.
likely_response.pronunciation: koong-SOOW-tih AW MAH-puh NUH ehsh-poo-zee-SOWN DUH POHNG-tih roo-MAHN-nuh OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DIH too-REEZH-moo NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Where can I find information about the Roman Bridge on the map? Consult the map at the Roman Bridge display or ask the tourism clerk at the information counter.

responses.english: Where can I find information about the Roman Bridge on the map? Consult the map at the Roman Bridge display or ask the tourism clerk at the information counter.
responses.phonetic: koong-SOOW-tih AW MAH-puh NUH ehsh-poo-zee-SOWN DUH POHNG-tih roo-MAHN-nuh OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DIH too-REEZH-moo NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
responses.french: Consulte o mapa na exposição da Ponte Romana ou pergunte ao atendente de turismo no balcão de informações.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ferry to Ilha de Tavira departs
phrases.text_local: Onde sai o ferry para a Ilha de Tavira?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SEYE AW FEH-ree PUH-ruh AH EE-lyuh DIH tuh-VEE-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: Ferry departures are strictly seasonal; verify summer schedules locally.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, embarques no Cais de Tavira.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, aym-BAH-ruh-kihsh NOO KEYESH DIH tuh-VEE-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, departures at Cais de Tavira.

responses.english: Good morning, departures at Cais de Tavira.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, aym-BAH-ruh-kihsh NOO KEYESH DIH tuh-VEE-ruh.
responses.french: Bom dia, embarques no Cais de Tavira.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to rent bikes along the Gilão River
phrases.text_local: Onde posso alugar bicicletas junto ao rio Gilão?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-deh ah-LOO-goo bi-see-KLEH-tahs JOON-too (link: ow) ow (link: HEE-oo) HEE-oo zhee-LAHN?
phrases.cultural_note: Bike rentals operate independently from the info center but are coordinated nearby.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no balcão de informações temos indicações sobre aluguer de bicicletas junto ao rio Gilão.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH TEH-moosh een-dee-kuh-SOHNYSH SOHB-rih uh-loo-GEHR DIH bee-seek-LEH-tuhsh ZHOONNG-too OW REEOO zhee-LOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the information desk we have directions on bike rentals along the Gilão River.

responses.english: Good morning, at the information desk we have directions on bike rentals along the Gilão River.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH TEH-moosh een-dee-kuh-SOHNYSH SOHB-rih uh-loo-GEHR DIH bee-seek-LEH-tuhsh ZHOONNG-too OW REEOO zhee-LOWN.
responses.french: Bom dia, no balcão de informações temos indicações sobre aluguer de bicicletas junto ao rio Gilão.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy the passport stamp souvenir
phrases.text_local: Onde posso comprar o carimbo souvenir para o passaporte?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR AW kuh-REEM-boo soow-vih-NEER PUH-ruh AW puh-suh-PAW-ruh-tih?
phrases.cultural_note: The 'Carimbo' is a traditional tourist passport stamp, highly collected in Algarve towns.
